name: Scotch Whisky Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald half and half in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Whisk yolks, sugar, and flour together until smooth.
3. Gradually whisk in hot half and half.
4. Set over boiling water and stir until thick enough to form mounds when dropped from a spoon (about 6 minutes).
5. Chill the top of the double boiler and remove it carefully.
6. Mix chilled whipping cream with espresso powder until dissolved.
7. Beat until firm peaks, then fold in Scotch whisky until firm.
8. Fold cream mixture into cold custard in two additions.
9. For trifle:
a. Place half of pound cake cubes in a 3-quart trifle bowl or glass bowl and sprinkle with 3 tbsp Scotch.
b. Heat raspberry jam until pourable, spoon over the cake, and spread.
c. Top with half of custard and half of raspberries (some showing at sides).
d. Add half of bananas on top.
e. Place remaining pound cake cubes in another bowl, sprinkle with 3 tbsp Scotch, and layer fruit over.
f. Spoon remaining jam over and spread.
g. Top with remaining custard.
h. Chill until set, at least 3 hours (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead).
10. Whip the chilled whipping cream and sugar to stiff peaks, then fold in 3 tbsp Scotch until firm.
11. Mound whipped cream on top of trifle.
12. Garnish with fresh raspberries and chocolate.
